name: Jurrac Velphito
name_jp: ジュラック・ヴェルヒプト
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner Dinosaur monsters
This card's ATK/DEF each become the total original ATK of the materials used for its Synchro Summon. At the start of the Damage Step, if this card attacks a face-down Defense Position monster: You can destroy that face-down Defense Position monster.
mnst_eff:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner Dinosaur monsters
This card's ATK/DEF each become the total original ATK of the materials used for its Synchro Summon. At the start of the Damage Step, if this card attacks a face-down Defense Position monster: You can destroy that face-down Defense Position monster.
eff:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner Dinosaur monsters
This card's ATK/DEF each become the total original ATK of the materials used for its Synchro Summon. At the start of the Damage Step, if this card attacks a face-down Defense Position monster: You can destroy that face-down Defense Position monster.

jp_sets.set: Duel Terminal Chronicle 2 - Chapter of Chaos

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-down Defense Position Monster Cards
Destroys battling monster at the start of the Damage Step
summoning: Does not require specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires Type specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
